Extreme Bass Booster for Chrome™. Boost bass for headphones and speakers with presets and custom levels.

Bass Booster Extreme is a powerful Chrome extension that enhances audio quality by boosting bass frequencies on any website. Perfect for music lovers, video enthusiasts, and anyone who wants richer, deeper sound from their headphones or speakers.

Key Features:
• Automatic audio detection - Automatically captures tabs with audio when they start playing
• Multiple presets - Choose from preset bass levels (Low Bass, Default, Medium, High, Very High)
• Custom volume control - Fine-tune bass levels with a custom slider (0-40 range)
• Real-time processing - Audio enhancement works instantly without page reload
• Enable/Disable toggle - Turn the extension on or off with one click
• Dark/Light theme - Choose your preferred interface theme
• Persistent settings - Your preferences are saved and restored automatically

How it works:
The extension uses Chrome's tabCapture API to capture audio streams from browser tabs and processes them through Web Audio API in an offscreen document. This allows for real-time audio enhancement without modifying the original website code.

Perfect for:
• Music streaming services (Spotify, YouTube Music, etc.)
• Video platforms (YouTube, Netflix, etc.)
• Online gaming
• Video conferencing
• Any website with audio content

The extension automatically detects when tabs start playing audio and applies your selected bass boost settings. You can adjust the level at any time through the popup interface.

Boost audio on any tab with powerful volume control, bass boost, and equalizer. Perfect for videos, music, and more.

# Volume Booster 

## Overview
Volume Booster is a powerful browser extension that enhances your audio experience by providing advanced volume control, bass boost, and equalizer features. Whether you're watching videos, listening to music, or participating in online meetings, Volume Booster helps you achieve the perfect audio balance.

## Key Features

### 1. Volume Control
- Boost volume up to 600% on any browser tab
- Independent volume control for each tab
- Smooth volume adjustment with precise control
- Preserve volume settings across sessions

### 2. User Interface
- Clean, intuitive design
- Quick access toolbar
- Easy-to-use sliders and controls

## How It Works

### Installation
1. Install the extension from the Chrome Web Store
2. Click the extension icon in your browser toolbar
3. The Volume Booster interface will appear

### Basic Usage
1. **Volume Control**
   - Use the main volume slider to adjust overall volume
   - Each tab maintains its own volume settings
   - Volume changes are applied in real-time

## Privacy & Security
- No data collection
- No ads
- No tracking
- Works entirely locally
- No internet connection required

## Support
- Regular updates
- Bug fixes
- Performance improvements
- User feedback implementation

## Troubleshooting
- If audio quality is distorted, reduce volume boost
- For best performance, close unnecessary tabs
- Reset settings if experiencing issues
- Update to the latest version for optimal performance

## Updates & Maintenance
- Regular feature updates
- Performance optimizations
- New preset additions
- Bug fixes and improvements

## User Feedback
We value user feedback and continuously work to improve the extension. Feel free to:
- Report bugs
- Suggest features
- Share your experience
- Rate the extension

## License
This extension is free to use for personal and commercial purposes.

For more information, support, or to report issues, please visit our support page or contact us through the Chrome Web Store.

Boost any tab up to 800% with multiband DSP. 10-band EQ, per-tab mixer, voice boost, night mode. No ads, no tracking.

Transform your browser's audio into a professional mixing studio.

Hearably is a mastering-grade volume booster and audio equalizer that enhances any tab's sound up to 800% without the harsh digital distortion found in standard extensions.

Whether you are trying to hear quiet dialogue on Netflix, boosting a low-volume YouTube video, or fine-tuning music with a 10-band EQ, Hearably delivers crystal-clear, distortion-free amplification. Built with a custom multi-band DSP engine and a zero-latency look-ahead limiter, it acts like a professional audio interface right inside your browser.

✨ KEY FEATURES:

🔊 Volume Booster (Up to 800%): Safely amplify quiet audio, podcasts, and movies well beyond your system's maximum volume.

🎛️ 10-Band Audio Equalizer: Fine-tune your frequencies with studio precision or choose from custom acoustic presets (Bass Boost, Vocal Clarity, etc.).

🎵 Distortion-Free Audio: Unlike generic boosters that ruin your speakers with digital clipping, Hearably uses multi-band compression and soft saturation to keep loud audio incredibly warm and clean.

🎧 Per-Tab Mixing: Control volume levels for individual tabs independently. Mute a noisy ad in one tab while boosting a podcast in another.

🔄 Seamless Gapless Playback: Auto-heals and perfectly maintains your audio settings across YouTube playlists and fullscreen mode.

💼 PERFECT FOR:

Entertainment: Boost the volume of quiet movies and YouTube videos.

Remote Work: Enhance the vocal clarity of low-volume Webex, Zoom, or Google Meet calls.

Accessibility: Increase dialogue presence for users with mild hearing loss.

Audiophiles: Sculpt the perfect sound profile for Spotify or SoundCloud web players.

💎 PRICING:
Hearably is a premium SaaS product with a generous free tier:

Hearably Free: Includes the 3-band EQ, basic audio controls, and volume boosting up to 120%.

Hearably Pro: Unlocks the massive 800% multi-band maximizer, 10-band parametric EQ, per-tab audio mixer, advanced DSP engine, and premium presets. Try it risk-free with a 3-Day Free Trial (then $4.99/mo or $49.99/yr).

Note: Hearably requires the "Read and change all your data on all websites" permission strictly to capture the audio stream of the active tab for enhancement. We do not track, store, or sell your browsing data.

Take full page screenshots, record your screen with webcam and microphone, or snap
any custom area — all in seconds, without leaving your browser.

⚡ Built for creators, developers, students, marketers, and support teams who need
fast, high-quality screen capture without watermarks, signups, or upload limits.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🖼  SCREENSHOT FEATURES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ Capture Visible Screen — one-click snapshot of your current tab
✅ Full Page Screenshot — scroll-stitched capture of long pages, articles, dashboards
✅ Custom Area Selection — drag to select any region with pixel-perfect cropping
✅ High-Resolution PNG Output — no compression, no quality loss
✅ Instant Preview, Copy & Download — paste into Slack, Notion, Figma, Docs, anywhere
✅ Works on YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter, and every major site

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🎥  SCREEN RECORDING FEATURES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ Record Screen with Audio in WebM / MP4 format
✅ Webcam Overlay — circular picture-in-picture, perfect for tutorials and Loom-style videos
✅ Microphone Capture — narrate demos, walkthroughs, and bug reports
✅ Tab, Window, or Full Desktop capture
✅ Pause, Resume, Stop — full control during recording
✅ Instant Download — no upload, no signup, no watermark, ever

🔒  WHY QUICK SHOTS?

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🚀  HOW TO USE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. Click the Quick Shots icon in your toolbar
2. Pick a mode: Capture Visible, Custom Selection, Full Page, or Start Recording
3. Save, copy, or download your screenshot or video — done!

No learning curve. No cloud accounts. No setup wizard.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🌟  WHAT YOU CAN DO
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• Take a YouTube video screenshot in one click
• Capture a full scrolling webpage as a single image
• Record a screencast with your face in the corner
• Make a quick tutorial with voiceover for your team
• Snap a TikTok frame, an Instagram story, or a tweet
• Document a bug with annotated screenshots
• Create training videos, product demos, and how-to content

Whether you need a screenshot tool, a screen recorder, a webcam recorder, a
scrolling screenshot extension, or a free Loom alternative — Quick Shots does it
all in one tiny, fast Chrome extension.

📌 Install now and start capturing smarter — it's free, it's fast, and it just works.
